name: communications-marketplace
description: A marketplace of communication and productivity plugins for Claude Code. Install specialized agents, tools, and workflows for various communication needs.

plugins.name: nbg-presentations
plugins.description: Multi-agent presentation system for National Bank of Greece. Create McKinsey-quality, board-ready presentations with NBG branding.

plugins.name: outlook-mailer
plugins.description: Send emails via Microsoft Outlook on macOS using AppleScript. Supports recipients, CC/BCC, HTML body, and file attachments.
